market_pulse: Memorial Day weekend prep in full swing with major talent announcements (Tiesto, Steve Aoki, David Guetta) across top venues; LIV Beach competing strongly with John Summit weekend headline while day clubs show heavy EDM focus.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, and Hakkasan posting MDW talent countdowns (5/29-5/31 lineups) with heavy story engagement, but LIV not matching countdown frequency for John Summit weekend.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy daily countdown stories for John Summit (Fri 5/29), David Guetta (Sat 5/30), and behind-scenes talent prep content to match competitor story velocity.

content_gaps.description: TikTok trending shows user outfit/OOTD content for LIV/LIV Beach but competitors (especially OMNIA) driving remixes and creator collaborations more actively.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch UGC remix campaign targeting @discolines and micro-influencers; offer exclusive LIV Beach dance content in exchange for tagged posts.

content_gaps.description: TAO Beach and Encore Beach Club posting live crowd moments and energy clips; LIV Beach posts are more polished, less raw/authentic feeling.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post more unfiltered live moments during John Summit set—crowd reactions, energy clips, real-time updates to Stories.
